PUNE'S FINEST
About the Artist

NEHAAL
MANOHAR
DEDGE

DJ Noddy is Pune's most sought-after performer — a name that needs no introduction on any dancefloor. With 20+ years of experience behind the decks, he brings unmatched energy, precision, and crowd-reading ability to every event.

From intimate birthday parties to grand weddings, high-voltage college fests to corporate galas — DJ Noddy crafts sets that keep the floor packed till the last beat drops.

Years Experience
